2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch removes the legacy ->iomap_begin() and ->iomap_end() path in the iomap code, as all in-tree filesystems have implemented the new ->iomap_next() interface. The changes affect several files, including fs/iomap/direct-io.c and include/linux/iomap.h. The removal of this legacy path simplifies the code and reduces complexity.
